task: Replay one owner-approved LLM topic decision as the Scout handoff for the no-write worker chain.
prompt: This is a deterministic replay artifact created from a human-approved topic decision. No live Scout rerank is performed.

proposals.title: GSC opportunity review: Last Z Alliance Duel Guide — Schedule, Day 1–6 Plan, and VS Strategy
proposals.source_reference: GSC weekly 2026-05-03: page opportunity and query-page signals
proposals.notes: High-impression event page with a clear query intent around schedule and VS strategy. This is a good candidate for a scoped update to improve query-to-page match without creating new content.
proposals.player_value: Helps players quickly find event timing, day-by-day plan, and matchup guidance on the existing guide.
proposals.duplication_risk: Medium. The topic could overlap with other event or schedule pages if cluster separation is not kept strict.
claims_to_verify: The current page remains the best canonical fit for schedule-related intent.
The update can be done without turning the page into a broader event hub.
No protected claims or cluster role boundaries are crossed.
proposals.next_step: Human review should confirm the page is still the best canonical home for this intent and define a narrow update scope.
evidence: GSC page signal: alliance-duel.html had 8212 impressions, 378 clicks, 4.60% CTR, avg position 6.26.

site_fit.primary_user_job: Improve query-to-page match and first-screen usefulness for `last z vs schedule` searchers.
site_fit.archetype_reason: Existing page is `event-guide` in the `Events` cluster; Scout should prefer updating the existing page before proposing new content.

constraints: Use existing page template and navigation patterns.
Treat GSC data as a signal, not proof that a rewrite is needed.
reject_if: The query intent is already better served by another canonical page.
The proposed change would blur cluster role separation.
The improvement cannot be expressed without changing a cornerstone page beyond the approved scope.

backlog_row_preview.title: GSC opportunity review: Last Z Alliance Duel Guide — Schedule, Day 1–6 Plan, and VS Strategy
backlog_row_preview.source_reference: GSC weekly 2026-05-03: page opportunity and query-page signals
backlog_row_preview.notes: High-impression event page with a clear query intent around schedule and VS strategy. This is a good candidate for a scoped update to improve query-to-page match without creating new content.

guardrails: Only approved_for_chain decisions may be replayed.
Replay does not approve public copy, patch specs, backlog edits, manifests, PRs, or deployment.
Owner approval remains required before any user-visible content change.

overview.description: Brief synthesis of the strongest content opportunities and why they matter.

selected_opportunities.description: Highest-value opportunities that are worth human review.

rejected_or_monitor.description: Opportunities that should not move forward now.
